title: Sandbox Memory Generation Pipeline

activity_flows.trigger: Called after each Runner.run() completes within a sandbox session
steps: CALL build_rollout_payload_from_result(result, exception, input_override) → payload dict

activity_flows.trigger: Direct payload enqueue (or called from enqueue_result)
steps: CALL storage.ensure_layout() — creates sessions/memories dirs if absent
BUILD ordered_payload: reorder keys so updated_at first, rollout_id second
CALL write_rollout(session, dump_rollout_json(ordered_payload), rollouts_path=sessions_dir, file_name) → rollout_file

activity_flows.trigger: BaseSandboxSession pre-stop hook (registered in __init__); called when session closes
steps: CHECK rollout_files empty → if empty: return early
CALL _ensure_worker() → if worker_task is None or done: create asyncio.Task(_worker())
AWAIT queue.join() — blocks until all items processed by _worker

activity_flows.trigger: asyncio.Task created by _ensure_worker(); runs concurrently during flush
steps: CHECK queue_item is _STOP → if True: return (task ends)
EXCEPT Exception: logger.exception('Sandbox memory worker failed') [does NOT re-raise]

activity_flows.trigger: Called per rollout JSONL file by _worker
steps: CALL run_phase_one(config, prompt, run_config) → artifacts (RolloutExtractionArtifacts: rollout_slug, rollout_summary, raw_memory)
CALL validate_rollout_artifacts(artifacts) → if INVALID: return early (skip this rollout)
PARSE payloads = [json.loads(line) for non-empty lines in rollout_contents]
CHECK payloads empty → if empty: return early
EXTRACT last payload for metadata: updated_at, terminal_state (from terminal_metadata dict)

activity_flows.trigger: Called after all _worker items are drained in flush()
steps: CHECK _pending_phase_two_rollout_ids empty → if empty: return early
CALL storage.build_phase_two_input_selection(max_raw_memories_for_consolidation) → PhaseTwoInputSelection (selects raw memories, applies recency-based forgetting if > max)
CHECK rebuild returned False → if False: return early
TRY: CALL run_phase_two(config, memory_root, selection, run_config) [LLM consolidation → writes MEMORY.md, memory_summary.md]
EXCEPT Exception: logger.exception('Sandbox memory phase 2 failed') → return

key_conditions: _stopped flag: prevents re-entrant flush and post-flush enqueues
Empty rollout_files in flush: skips all processing
validate_rollout_artifacts fails: phase-1 output discarded, rollout not promoted to phase-2
Empty JSONL payloads: _process_rollout_file returns early without writing
rebuild_raw_memories returns False: phase-2 consolidation is skipped
Phase-2 exception: logged, write_phase_two_selection not called, pending IDs not cleared

key_data_structures._rollout_files_by_rollout_id: dict[str, str] — maps rollout_id → JSONL filename in sessions_dir
key_data_structures._pending_phase_two_rollout_ids: list[str] — rollout IDs that completed phase-1 and await phase-2
key_data_structures._queue: asyncio.Queue[str | object] — holds rollout filenames + _STOP sentinel
key_data_structures._flush_lock: asyncio.Lock — serializes enqueue and flush, prevents double-flush
key_data_structures._worker_task: asyncio.Task | None — single background worker task

filesystem_layout.MEMORY.md: memories/MEMORY.md — consolidated memory index (written by phase-2)
filesystem_layout.memory_summary.md: memories/memory_summary.md — injected into agent prompt (written by phase-2)
filesystem_layout.phase_two_selection.json: memories/phase_two_selection.json — records which raw memories were used
filesystem_layout.raw_memories.md: memories/raw_memories.md — intermediate concatenation for phase-2 LLM

external_dependencies.run_phase_one: phase_one.py — LLM call (MemoryGenerateConfig model) that extracts rollout_slug, rollout_summary, raw_memory from JSONL
external_dependencies.run_phase_two: phase_two.py — LLM consolidation agent that synthesizes MEMORY.md + memory_summary.md from raw memories
external_dependencies.SandboxMemoryStorage: storage.py — file I/O wrapper: ensure_layout, read_text, write_text, build_phase_two_input_selection, rebuild_raw_memories, write_phase_two_selection
external_dependencies.write_rollout: rollouts.py — appends ordered_payload JSON line to sessions_dir JSONL file
external_dependencies.build_rollout_payload_from_result: rollouts.py — serializes RunResult + exception + input_override into dict payload

concurrency_notes: _flush_lock guards both enqueue_rollout_payload and flush — enqueues are blocked during flush startup
_worker runs as a single asyncio Task; queue serializes rollout file processing
asyncio.gather in _process_rollout_file writes raw_memories and rollout_summary concurrently
Workers are created lazily in _ensure_worker() only when flush is triggered
important_notes: Two-phase memory generation: Phase-1 per-rollout extraction (conversation→raw_memory+summary), Phase-2 global consolidation (raw_memories→MEMORY.md+memory_summary.md). Memory generation is triggered automatically on session close via pre-stop hook. MemoryGenerateConfig.max_raw_memories_for_consolidation (default 256) controls forgetting — newer memories kept. Multiple Memory capabilities on same session allowed if layouts differ. WeakKeyDictionary registry (module-level) manages manager lifecycle tied to session lifetime.
